outlook.headline: HBM content helps, but helium curtailment keeps supply uneven
outlook.summary: The near-term read is mixed: specialty materials exposure to advanced memory/HBM remains supportive for Entegris, while Air Products is seeing a clear supply headwind from Qatar helium curtailment. That leaves the sector constructive on demand pockets but not broadly improving on supply, with tightness likely to persist unevenly into the next 1-2 quarters. Watch whether helium disruptions broaden beyond Air Products’ cited sourcing issue or stay localized.

drivers.label: Advanced memory/HBM materials content
drivers.detail: Specialty materials content in advanced memory/HBM applications supports product demand for upstream materials suppliers.

drivers.label: Helium supply curtailment in Qatar
drivers.detail: Reduced helium availability is creating a direct supply headwind despite resilient sourcing.

drivers.label: Resilient sourcing partially offsets disruption
drivers.detail: Supply remains constrained, but sourcing resilience should limit the severity of the shortfall.

risks: Qatar helium curtailment persists longer than expected, tightening supply further.
HBM-related demand softens, reducing the positive read for specialty materials.
No broader company coverage yet makes it hard to tell if tightness is localized or sector-wide.
